overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a wizard character in dark robes walking along a stormy coastal railway track built into a cliffside. The scene features atmospheric storm lighting with dark clouds, occasional lightning strikes, and misty distant views of gothic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliffside railway walkway with stone walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the stone platform between a low parapet wall and railway tracks

entered.detail: metal railway tracks running parallel to the walkway on the right side
tall rocky cliff wall with layered stone texture rising immediately beside the tracks
cobblestone paved path that the character is walking on
low stone wall running along the left edge of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow stone platform flanked by railway tracks on the right and a low stone parapet on the left. Storm clouds fill the sky overhead while the cliff face rises steeply on the right, creating an enclosed, atmospheric corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: curving cliffside path with distant views

events.description: lightning strike flashes across the distant sky illuminating the storm clouds
distant gothic castle spires become visible through the mist ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the gently curving path as the cliff face recedes and distant structures emerge from the fog

entered.detail: misty silhouette of gothic towers and spires visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses along the curving walkway, a lightning flash briefly lights up the stormy sky, revealing distant castle spires through the fog. The cliff face and tracks gradually recede to the right while the path continues forward into the misty distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: corner bend in the railway walkway

events.description: character turns left around the corner where the stone wall ends

agents.ego_description: turning left around the corner of the walkway, revealing the view beyond the parapet wall

entered.detail: fog-covered landscape and void visible beyond the parapet wall on the left

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a bend in the path and turns left, moving away from the cliff face. As the camera turns, the stone parapet reveals a misty valley view below, while the railway tracks continue alongside on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a stormy cliffside railway that transitions from an enclosed stone corridor into an expansive vista of a misty valley. It begins with the character walking along a narrow stone platform, flanked by railway tracks and a steep cliff face that creates a sense of confinement under heavy storm clouds. As the character progresses along the curving walkway, a sudden flash of lightning illuminates the sky, momentarily revealing distant castle spires through the thick fog. The scene then shifts as the cliff face and tracks recede to the right, leading the character toward a bend in the path. Finally, the camera turns left, moving away from the rock wall to reveal a wide, misty valley unfolding below the stone parapet.
